title: [CI:DOCS] man pages: document some --format options
body:
Baby steps toward merging #14046: document a few of the Go format
command-line options.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

```release-note
Document the options available via `--format` in certain podman subcommands
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Applying this patch will remove a bunch of the functions we do not want to document/implement.
[stats-cleanup.patch](https://github.com/containers/podman/files/8814506/stats-cleanup.patch.txt)

> Applying this patch will remove a bunch of the functions we do not want to document/implement. [stats-cleanup.patch](https://github.com/containers/podman/files/8814506/stats-cleanup.patch.txt)

This will break a lot of things. These extra functions are there for a reason. It is to format the output in a more human friendly way.
Then we need to find a way for these functions to only be mentioned once.  Not duplicated in strange ways.

@rhatdan we seem to be stuck. I would like for all autocompletion options to be documented. You would like for _only the useful_ autocomplete options to be documented. We (royal "we", meaning "someone") can do that, but it will grow stale and obsolete over time because there will be no way to cross-check it. So maybe the happy medium is not to document anything at all. Since autocompletion is a discovery tool, and has very quick trial-and-error response, I can accept that.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
I think we leave this undocumented.
